◎译　　名　撒旦万岁？ / 撒旦万万岁(台) / 魔鬼万岁
◎片　　名　Hail Satan?
◎年　　代　2019
◎产　　地　美国
◎类　　别　纪录片
◎语　　言　英语
◎上映日期　2019-01-25(圣丹斯电影节) / 2019-04-19(美国)
◎IMDb评分  7.3/10 from 7992 users
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt9358044/
◎豆瓣评分　7.6/10 from 626 users
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/30390704/
◎片　　长　95分钟(圣丹斯电影节)
◎导　　演　潘妮·琳恩 Penny Lane

◎简　　介  

　　A look at the intersection of religion and activism, tracing the rise of The Satanic Temple: only six years old and already one of the most controversial religious movements in American history. The Temple is calling for a Satanic revolution to save the nation’s soul. But are they for real?

introduction: A look at the intersection of religion and activism, tracing the rise of The Satanic Temple: only six years old and already one of the most controversial religious movements in American history. The Temple is calling for a Satanic revolution to save the nation’s soul. But are they for real?
